Appearances:
Plaintiff Sylvia Gillespie is present.
Attorney James Millar appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Luch Zaldana aka Luch Saldana is present.
Attorney Caitlin Blythe representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-16-2012 is vacated.
